arts.ttl: Hearts were second best against Hibs and that's unacceptable but DON'T tell me balance of power has swung - Ryan Stevenson
arts.sum: Gorgie hero is concerned by back-to-back derby defeats but says Neil Critchley's siude must cement a top six spot to give themselves another crack at laying down the capital law.

arts.ttl: Tony Docherty challenges Dundee to make MORE Scottish Cup history against Hearts
arts.sum: Docherty knows his team are closing in on something really special

arts.ttl: Dundee handed Scott Fraser injury boost as Tony Docherty eyes up Hearts redemption in Scottish Cup clash
arts.sum: The midfielder has been out of action since October with a serious groin issue
